授業目的: 英文欄参照/Refer to the following
到達目標: 英文欄参照/Refer to the following
授業方法: In principle, all classes will be face-to-face; however, materials, tasks, and explanations will also be posted in a Google Classroom dedicated to this class. If you need to contact me, please do so at andrew.kgu@gmail.com.Depending on enrollment, course format may include the following:- Individual, pair and group discussion based on topics that relate to content - Sharing of information, including weekly homework assignments, on Google Classroom- Presentation and homework assignments- All components of the course conducted in English- Being a level 1 class, students will be expected to perform English tasks at an intermediate level

第1回:
**The following is a schedule of what the course MIGHT look like. Exact contents will depend on student interests and needs, as determined by the needs analysis completed during Startup Week. The schedule below will change if we do a virtual exchange with students in another country**

【Startup Week】  
"Online Class (Task-oriented format)" /《90minutes》

This is the introductory video for this lesson and course: https://kwansei.jp.panopto.com/Panopto/Pages/Viewer.aspx?id=f395fbc6-5cb9-4556-bb65-b41e00613f48

GOOGLE CLASSROOM CODE: bvszkgjz

Startup Week contents: Class overview, introduction, and tasks. Watch my video and complete tasks assigned in the video
第2回:
【Core Week 1】
"Face-to-face class" /《90minutes》 

The basics of world economies and how it affects our lives in Japan (economics topic #1)

【Flex Hours】 "Online class (Task-oriented format) " /《20minutes》

Each week will involve directed online readings and your own personal online research to complete a  journal submission of at least 220 words that will involve topics to be discussed in the following class. I will check your work within 24 hours before the following class with evaluation. Journal 1
第3回:
【Core Week 2】

"Face-to-face class" /《90minutes》
 
The role of women in the Japanese economy (womenomics), discussion of first journal (economics topic #2)

【Flex Hours】 "Online class (Task-oriented format) " /《20minutes》
Directed online tasks and your own personal online research - flex hours - to complete before the following class. Journal 2
第4回:
【Core Week 3】

"Face-to-face class" /《90minutes》 

The sharing economy in Japan and around the world, discussion of second journal (economics topic #3)

【Flex Hours】 "Online class (Task-oriented format) " /《20minutes》
Directed online tasks and your own personal online research - flex hours - to complete before the following class. Journal 3

Japanese and Canadian companies: an introduction, discussion of third journal (business topic #1)

【Flex Hours】 "Online class (Task-oriented format) " /《20minutes》

第7回:

【Flex Hours】 "Online class (Task-oriented format) " /《20minutes》
Directed online tasks and your own personal online research - flex hours - to complete before the following class. Journal 6
第8回:

"Face-to-face class" /《90minutes》 

Importing, exporting, and what makes a “good life", discussion of sixth journal (business topic #3)

【Flex Hours】 "Online class (Task-oriented format) " /《20minutes》

学生による授業評価の方法Course Evaluation by Student: To be conducted during the last week of class

各授業科目は、各学部・研究科の定めるディプロマ・ポリシー（DP）・カリキュラム・ポリシー（CP）に基づき、カリキュラム上に配置されています。DP・CPを意識して本授業科目の学修を進めることで、各学部・研究科の期待する能力が養成されます。各学部・研究科のDP、CPや教育課程表（授業科目一覧等）は、下記リンクこちらに掲載していますので学修計画の参考にしてください。https://kwic.kwansei.ac.jp/cabinet/reference?typeCd=0&cabinetId=557&directLink=1※kwicへのリンクとなります（在学生のみ閲覧可）
